title: Module missing permission constants
description: The main module class uses CheckPermission() with string literals instead of defining MANAGE_PERM / USE_PERM constants.
explanation: Modern CMSMS modules define permission names as class constants (e.g. const MANAGE_PERM = 'Manage MyModule') and reference them throughout the module. This prevents typos, enables IDE autocompletion, and makes permission names easy to change.
